api-design.positive: Define the public REST error response and idempotency contract for an external payments endpoint.
api-design.negative: Refactor a private price calculation helper without changing any public request, response, or external contract.

delegate-work.positive: Split this authorized migration into independent agent work packets with disjoint file ownership.
delegate-work.negative: Fix one tightly coupled function in a single file without using other agents.

domain-modeling.positive: Use $domain-modeling to define invoice states, invariants, ownership, and acceptance examples before implementation.
domain-modeling.negative: Implement routine CRUD for an entity whose behavior is already specified.

full-stack-testing.positive: Design a CI and cross-layer verification strategy spanning an API, database, browser, and deployment artifact.
full-stack-testing.negative: Add and run focused endpoint tests without changing test strategy, infrastructure, CI, or cross-boundary delivery evidence.

git.positive: Resolve this Git merge conflict without losing either branch's intended change.
git.negative: Edit a source file without staging, committing, or inspecting Git state.

grill-me.positive: Use $grill-me to interview me one consequential decision at a time before you plan or implement anything.
grill-me.negative: Ask the one blocking clarification needed to complete an ordinary implementation request.

javascript.positive: Fix promise cleanup and ESM interop in this .mjs build script.
javascript.negative: Implement an ordinary JavaScript REST handler whose correctness does not depend on JavaScript language semantics.

mongodb.positive: Make this MongoDB inventory update atomic and add the required compound index.

nextjs.positive: Fix App Router revalidation and Server Component cache behavior in the installed Next.js version.
nextjs.negative: Fix a generic React Hook that has no Next.js behavior.

node-js.positive: Handle Node.js process signals, child-process cancellation, and asynchronous stream cleanup.
node-js.negative: Fix ordinary API authorization logic merely hosted on Node, with no Node process, module, package, I/O, worker, CLI, or runtime API behavior.

planning.positive: Create an evidence-backed migration plan with sequencing, decision points, rollback, and acceptance checks.
planning.negative: Implement this already specified one-line local fix.

powershell.positive: Repair PowerShell native argument quoting and terminating error handling for literal paths.
powershell.negative: Change a generic Windows application preference through its supported UI.

project-documentation.positive: Update AGENTS.md from repository evidence and verify every documented command and path.

python.positive: Fix Python asyncio cancellation cleanup and packaging metadata for the installed interpreter.
python.negative: Run a Python-based tool while changing only non-Python source.

react.positive: Fix a React Effect loop, hydration mismatch, and component focus behavior.
react.negative: Change only Next.js route caching and revalidation policy.

redis.positive: Fix a Redis idempotency-key race involving SET NX, TTL, and concurrent retries.
redis.negative: Change an implementation-neutral cache interface with no Redis semantics.

software-engineering.positive: Implement a mixed-stack change that alters repository-wide contracts, persistence, errors, and delivery evidence.
software-engineering.negative: Research whether to upgrade one dependency without implementing a code or architecture change.

sql.positive: Design a PostgreSQL migration with constraints, locking, index rollout, and rollback semantics.

systematic-debugging.positive: Reproduce and fix this observed intermittent crash with a deterministic regression test.
systematic-debugging.negative: Apply an already diagnosed pre-scoped fix when no reproduction or root-cause work remains.

typescript.positive: Fix a TypeScript declaration merge, generic constraint, and tsconfig compiler error.
typescript.negative: Fix React rendering in a TSX file without changing types, declarations, tsconfig, compiler behavior, or typed contracts.

ui-ux-design.positive: Implement and visually verify a responsive accessible dashboard and its interaction states.
ui-ux-design.negative: Change a backend API with no user interface.

web-application-security.positive: Fix cross-tenant object authorization and add negative tests at the web trust boundary.
web-application-security.negative: Parse trusted internal data in an ordinary web helper with no sensitive sink.

web-research.positive: Evaluate the current supported version and migration risks of a dependency using official sources.
web-research.negative: Answer from complete stable local evidence when browsing is neither requested nor useful.
